properties.name: natGatewayId
properties.description: The ID of the NAT gateway

properties.name: subnetId
properties.description: The ID of the subnet in which the NAT gateway is located

properties.name: vpcId
properties.description: The ID of the VPC in which the NAT gateway is located

properties.name: state
properties.description: The state of the NAT gateway

properties.name: connectivityType
properties.description: Indicates whether the NAT gateway supports public or private connectivity

properties.name: natGatewayAddresses
properties.description: Information about the IP addresses and network interface associated with the NAT gateway

properties.name: createTime
properties.description: The date and time the NAT gateway was created

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Any tags assigned to the NAT gateway
